snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal вАФ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor вАФ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni вАФ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as VickyвАЩs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani
DOP: Stanley Mudda
Editor: Sanjay Sankla
Music: Monty Sharma
Casting: Taran Bajaj
Production Designer: Keshav Thakur
Art Director: Rakesh Sutar

localized.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
localized.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal вАФ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor вАФ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni вАФ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Spring continues with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 3 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP A vs GROUP C

The final day of the Play-Ins will decide the top 8 teams advancing to the Main Event on May 14.

Group A
вЩ¶ NXT Esports
вЩ¶ iQOO Total Gaming
вЩ¶ Raiders United
вЩ¶ Reflex United
вЩ¶ NoMoreMercy
вЩ¶ DP Dominators

Group C
вЩ¶ Revenant XSpark
вЩ¶ RNX Esports
вЩ¶ Flame Esports
вЩ¶ Max Esports
вЩ¶ Tonde Nepal Esports
вЩ¶ Total Winner

Schedule рЯУЛ
рЯУЕ SA Play-Ins - May 8, 9, 10

рЯУЕ Grand Finals - May 18

а∞Ча∞Ѓа∞®а∞ња∞Х: "а∞Ха∞Ња∞™а±Аа∞∞а±Иа∞Яа±Н а∞Ъа∞Яа±На∞Яа∞В 1976а∞≤а±Ла∞®а∞њ а∞Єа±Жа∞Ха±На∞Ја∞®а±Н 107 а∞™а±На∞∞а∞Ха∞Ња∞∞а∞В, а∞µа∞ња∞Ѓа∞∞а±На∞ґ, а∞µа±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞Ца±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞®а∞В, а∞µа∞Ња∞∞а±На∞§а∞Њ а∞®а∞ња∞µа±За∞¶а∞®, а∞ђа±Ла∞Іа∞®, а∞™а∞Ња∞Ва∞°а∞ња∞§а±На∞ѓа∞В а∞Ѓа∞∞а∞ња∞ѓа±Б а∞™а∞∞а∞ња∞ґа±Ла∞Іа∞® а∞µа∞Ва∞Яа∞њ а∞™а±На∞∞а∞ѓа±Ла∞Ьа∞®а∞Ња∞≤ а∞Ха±Ла∞Єа∞В 'а∞®а±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞ѓа∞Ѓа±Иа∞® а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞ѓа±Ла∞Ча∞В'а∞Ха±Б а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ѓа∞§а∞њ а∞За∞µа±На∞µа∞ђа∞°а∞ња∞Ва∞¶а∞њ. а∞®а±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞ѓа∞Ѓа±Иа∞® а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞ѓа±Ла∞Ча∞В а∞Еа∞®а±За∞¶а∞њ а∞Ха∞Ња∞™а±Аа∞∞а±Иа∞Яа±Н а∞Ъа∞Яа±На∞Яа∞Ња∞≤ а∞¶а±На∞µа∞Ња∞∞а∞Њ а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ѓа∞§а∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞ђа∞°а±Ба∞§а±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ, а∞≤а±За∞Ха∞™а±Ла∞§а±З а∞Еа∞¶а∞њ а∞Йа∞≤а±На∞≤а∞Ва∞Ша∞® а∞Ха∞Ња∞µа∞Ъа±На∞Ъа±Б. а∞≤а∞Ња∞≠а∞Ња∞™а±За∞Ха±На∞Ј а∞≤а±За∞®а∞њ, а∞µа∞ња∞¶а±На∞ѓа∞Њ а∞Єа∞Ва∞ђа∞Ва∞Іа∞Ѓа±Иа∞® а∞≤а±За∞¶а∞Њ а∞µа±На∞ѓа∞Ха±На∞§а∞ња∞Ча∞§ а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞ѓа±Ла∞Ча∞В а∞®а±На∞ѓа∞Ња∞ѓа∞Ѓа±Иа∞® а∞µа∞ња∞®а∞ња∞ѓа±Ла∞Ча∞Ња∞®а∞ња∞Ха∞њ а∞Еа∞®а±Ба∞Ха±Ва∞≤а∞Ва∞Ча∞Њ а∞Йа∞Ва∞Яа±Ба∞Ва∞¶а∞њ."

а∞Ѓа∞Ѓа±На∞Ѓа∞≤а±На∞®а∞њ а∞Єа∞Ва∞™а±На∞∞а∞¶а∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞Ва∞°а∞њ рЯТМ : kinsonfleek@gmail.com

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo

There is a friend for little children
Above the bright blue skies
A friend who never changes
Whose love never dies
Unlike our friends by nature
Who change with changing years
This friend is always with us
His name is god alone

Kaise main bhula doon woh beete huye pal
Har lamha sataaye woh gujaraa hua kal
Kaise main bataun yeh mushkil raaz hai
Kal aaye na kabhi jo hai woh aaj hai
Meri jaan paas aa ke bol do
Muskura ke chup na raha karo
Chup na raha karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par mila karo

Aa..

Phoolon ki waadiyan, barfeele raaste
Hain jaan-e-tamanna sab tere vaaste
Phoolon mein hai chubhan
Sardi mein agan hai
Saanson mein raat din
Yeh kaisi jalan hai
He he he he he he he
Ha ha ha ha he he he he
Sard thandi havaaein
Keh rahi hain fizaayein
Yun na jalaa karo
Yun na jalaa karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo

Dildar hain tumhaare

Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

snippet.title: GEORGE KUTTY And FAMILY Recreated | DRISHYAM 3 Trailer Launch | Mohanlal | Meena | Esther Anil
snippet.description:
GEORGE KUTTY And FAMILY Recreated | DRISHYAM 3 Trailer Launch | Mohanlal | Meena | Esther Anil

#drishyam3 #trailerlaunch #mohanlal 


Today, We Bring You Exclusive Coverage Of The Drishyam 3 Trailer Launch Event, Where Georgekutty And His Family Returned To The Spotlight To Unveil The Final Chapter Of This Legendary Saga.
вАЛwitness The Grand Trailer Launch Event As Mohanlal And Director Jeethu Joseph Take Us Through The Journey Of Creating The "Perfect" Ending To The Trilogy That Redefined The Thriller Genre.

Star-studded Cast & Crew At The Event:

вАЛthe Family: Mohanlal (Georgekutty)
Meena (Rani)
Ansiba Hassan (Anju)
Esther Anil (Anumol).

вАЛthe Investigators:
Murali Gopy (Ig Thomas Bastin)
Asha Sharath (Geetha Prabhakar)
Siddique (Prabhakar).

вАЛthe Visionaries: Directed By Jeethu Joseph And Produced By Antony Perumbavoor Under Aashirvad Cinemas.
вАЛthe Technical Team: Music By Anil Johnson And Cinematography By Satheesh Kurup.

snippet.title: Tera Ho Jaun | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun Dhawan, Pooja Hegde | WNC | Stebin, Jonita, Vayu
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Tera Ho Jaun from Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, featuring the beautiful chemistry of Varun Dhawan and Pooja Hegde. вЭ§пЄПвЬ®Sung by Stebin Ben and Jonita Gandhi, this romantic love song is composed by White Noise Collectives with heartfelt lyrics by Vayu.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

#HaiJawaniTohIshqHonaHai in cinemas on 5th June 2026.

Song Details : 
Singer: Stebin Ben & Jonita Gandhi
Lyrics: Vayu
Music: White Noise Collectives
Programmed & Arranged: Abhishek Singh @ White Noise Collectives 
Backing Vocals - Akanksha Sethi
Music Production Head: Romil Ved
Recording Engineer - Susmeet Rewaskar @ White Noise Collectives
Mixed & Mastered: Swar Mehta
Director Of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly

Movie Credits : 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy.
Head Of Production Varsha Taurani
Co-Producer Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
Dop Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer Farhad Samji
Music White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali & Gill Machhrai (Classy Beats), JavedвАУMohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics Vayu, Jaira, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Machhrai (Classy Beats), Ip Singh
Director Of Choreography Vijay Ganguly
Editor Ritesh Soni
Production Designer Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director Sunil Rodrigues
Sound Recording & Sound Design Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kaushik
Re-Recording Mixer Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (Uk)
Di Studio Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design House Of Ave
Pr Agency Hype
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd.

Lyrics : 

Bhool Ke Saari Jag Ki Fikrein Paas Tere Main Aaun
Bhool Ke Saari Jag Ki Fikrein Paas Tere Main Aaun
Teri Aankhon Ke Saayon Mein Apni Roshni Paun
Main Bas Tera Hi, Main Bas Tera Hi, Tera Hi Main Ho JaunвА¶

Khwaab Hai Ya Kismat Hai Tu
Hai Yakeen Mushkil
Kaise Maanu Ki Main Tere
Pyaar Ke Kaabil. 

Khwaab Hai Ya Kismat Hai Tu
Hai Yakeen Mushkil
Kaise Maanu Ki Main Tere
Pyaar Ke Kaabil. 
Isse Badhke Rutba Kya Ke
Main Tera KehlaunвА¶
Kya Hai Tere, Dil Mein, Keh De
Chain Se So PaunвА¶
Teri Ho Jaun 
Tera Ho Jaun 
Main Bas Tera Hi, Main Bas Tera Hi
Tera Hi main ho jaunвА¶

snippet.title: Mother's Day Special Songs 2026 | Chandaniya Lori Lori | Luka Chuppi | Choti Si Asha | Songs for Maa
snippet.description:
Celebrate the unconditional love of mothers with this special MotherвАЩs Day Audio Jukebox featuring soulful and emotional songs from beloved Bollywood films. Sit back, relax, and dedicate these beautiful melodies to the most special person in your life.

#mothersday #mothersdayspecial #mothersdaysongs #maa #lukachupi #chotisiasha #mothersday2026 

Timestamps:
00:00 вАУ Luka Chuppi | Rang De Basanti
06:34 вАУ Chandaniya Lori Lori | Rowdy Rathore
10:25 вАУ Tu Hain Toh | Mr. And Mrs. Mahi
15:07 вАУ Abhi Mujh Mein Kahin | Agneepath
21:08 вАУ Sapna Jahan | Brothers
26:49 вАУ Choti Si Asha | Roja
31:42 вАУ Hututu | Mimi
35:23 вАУ Chhoti Si Chiraiyya | Mimi
39:59 вАУ Meri Pukaar Suno | Meri Pukaar Suno
44:50 вАУ Maa | Nil Battey Sannata

Singer: Lata Mangeshkar, A.R. Rahman
Composer: A.R. Rahman

Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya

Choti Si Asha вАУ Roja
Singer: Minmini
Composer: A.R. Rahman
Lyrics: P.K. Mishra

Hututu вАУ Mimi
Singer: Shashaa Tirupati
Composer: A.R. Rahman
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya

Chhoti Si Chiraiyya вАУ Mimi
Singer: Kailash Kher
Composer: A.R. Rahman

Meri Pukaar Suno вАУ Meri Pukaar Suno
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik, Shreya Ghoshal, Shaan
Composer: Lost Stories

Experience the ultimate expression of love! вЭ§пЄП Sabba teams up with the sensational Pranjal Dahiya for "Sach Jani," a soulful masterpiece from the hit album 'Proud.'

With deep lyrics that resonate with every heart, "Sach Jani" beautifully captures the devotion of a partner who loves as unconditionally as a mother. Featuring a captivating performance by Pranjal Dahiya and the signature sounds of Black Virus, this is the love anthem of 2026.

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara Arjun, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

рЯСЙ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

snippet.title: а§Ѓа•Иа§В а§§а•За§∞а•З а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а§Ња§Ча§≤ | Prem Bandhan | Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar Songs
snippet.description:
рЯОґ Immerse yourself in the timeless romance of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar with 'Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal' from the movie Prem Bandhan! Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

If this song touched your heart, please give it a like, share your favorite classic Hindi song in the comments, and subscribe for more timeless melodies! Let the magic of music live onвА¶ вЬ®

snippet.title: IMAYE (Official Lyric Video) | Shabir Sulthan | Srinisha Jayaseelan | Roshan Jamrock
snippet.description:
#MustDateThePlayboy #MDTP #SingaporeTamil #TamilSeries #TamilDrama #TamilLoveSeries #TamilRomance #YouthLoveStory #CollegeLove #TamilWebSeries #Vasantham #MeWatch #ZaynAndTara #TamilTrending #LoveDrama #TamilAudience #PlayboySeries #TamilCouple #RomanticSeries #SingaporeDrama #Shorts

вАШIMAYEвАЩ is a cinematic Tamil melody that blends classic melody, rap, R&B and Indian semi-classical influences into a contemporary soundscape.

Composed and written by Shabir Sulthan, the song is performed by Shabir Sulthan alongside Srinisha Jayaseelan and Roshan Jamrock. вАШIMAYEвАЩ also serves as the official opening soundtrack of MediacorpвАЩs hit series Must Date The Playboy directed by trendsetting filmmaker T Suriavelan. 

Available on all major streaming platforms. 

Listen to IMAYE on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/6l9QzVbtnlN4BTrO7ZQZ3O?si=4250d42c6ff040f7

Listen to IMAYE on Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/gb/song/imaye-feat-srinisha-jayaseelan-roshan-jamrock/1894750739

Music Credits

Shabir Sulthan

Vocals by
Shabir Sulthan, Srinisha Jayaseelan & Roshan Jamrock

Rap Lyrics by
Roshan Jamrock

Keyboard Programming by

рЯОґ Dive into the soulful world of Kumar Sanu with this timeless classic, 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar' from the movie Mr. Aashiq! Relive the magic of 90s Bollywood romance with this unforgettable melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Kumar Sanu's voice is pure emotion, weaving stories of affection and heartbreak that resonate even today. His contribution to Indian music is immeasurable, and this song is a testament to his incredible talent.

This video features the beautifully crafted song 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar', transporting you back to a golden era of Bollywood music. Experience the charm, the passion, and the sheer artistry of this iconic song.

Album: Mr. Aashiq

snippet.title: Bahut Pyaar Karte Hai | Rimsha Khan | Saajan | Madhuri Dixit | 90's Hindi Romantic Songs
snippet.description:
Bahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko Sanam | Rimsha Khan | Tiktok Viral Song | Irfan Production

#bahutpyaarkartehai #saajansongs #madhuridixit

Song : Bahut Pyar Karte Hain
Singer : Anuradha Paudwal
Music : Nadeem - Shravan
Lyrics : Sameer
Movie : Saajan

Lyrics : 
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Kasam chaahe le lo
Kasam chaahe le lo khuda ki kasam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam

Hamari ghazal hai tasavvur tumhara
Hamari ghazal hai tasavvur tumhara

Tumhare bina ab na jeena Gawara

Tumhein yunhi  hi chaahenge
Tumhein yunhi  hi chaahenge jab tak hai dum

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam 

Sagar ki baahon mein maujein hain jitni
Sagar ki baahon mein maujein hain jitni

Humko bhi tumse mohabbat hai utni

Ke yeh bekarari
Ke yeh bekarari na ab hogi kam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam

Kasam chaahe le lo
Kasam chaahe le lo khuda ki kasam

Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
Bahut pyaar karte hain tumko sanam
 #OldHindiSongs #BahutPyarKarteHaiTumkoSanam #HindiCover
Presenting my heartfelt recreation of вАЬBahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko SanamвАЭ вЭ§пЄП

This timeless melody carries deep love, devotion, and emotional sincerity that has touched listeners for years. In this recreated version, I have tried to preserve the soulful tenderness, romantic intensity, and classic emotional beauty associated with the original while presenting it through my own musical interpretation and style.

This cover has been independently conceptualized, arranged, recorded, produced, and vocally refined by me as a personalized musical reinterpretation. My intention with this recreation was not to simply repeat an existing rendition, but to present it with sincerity, emotional depth, and a graceful classical touch for listeners who connect with evergreen Hindi melodies and heartfelt expressions of love.

Through this Hindi Retro Reimagined presentation, I wanted to bring together nostalgia, softness, and timeless romance in a way that feels both respectful to the original spirit and fresh in its own expression. My aim was to create a version that feels intimate, soulful, and emotionally immersive for every listener who connects with the beauty of classic Hindi music.

If you enjoyed this version, please Like, Share, Comment, and Subscribe for more soulful recreations, timeless classics, and emotionally driven musical performances.

рЯОІ Best experienced with headphones for full depth and atmosphere.

Credits:
Title: Bahut Pyar Karte Hai Tumko Sanam
Category: Classical Recreation / Hindi Retro Reimagined
Recreated Cover: Deepak Pandey

This is a personal musical reinterpretation created in my own style.

а§Иа§ґа•На§µа§∞ а§Ха•Л а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ха§єа§Њ а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•И, а§Еа§•а§µа§Њ а§ѓа§•а§Ња§∞а•На§• а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ха•Л а§єа•А а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§®, а§∞а§Ъа§§а§Њ а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§ґа§Ха•На§§а§ња§Ѓа§Ња§® а§Ха•З а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа§Ња§®а§Њ а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•И l а§За§Єа§Ха§Њ а§Еа§∞а•На§• а§єа•И а§Ха§њ а§µа§є а§Єа§≠а•А а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•Ла§Ъа•На§Ъ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§єа§Ѓ а§Єа§∞а•На§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§У а§Ха•З а§™а§ња§§а§Њ (father) а§єа•И, а§Ьа•Л а§єа§Ѓа•З а§Єа•Ба§Ц а§Фа§∞ а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§Ха§Њ а§Еа§µа§ња§®а§Ња§ґа•А а§µа§∞а•На§Ја§Њ а§¶а•За§§а•З а§єа•И l а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха•А а§§а§∞а§є, а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§® а§™а•На§∞а§Ха§Ња§ґ а§Ха§Њ а§єа•А а§Па§Х а§Єа•Ва§Ха•На§Ја•На§Ѓ а§ђа§ња§Ва§¶а•Б а§єа•И, а§≤а•За§Ха§ња§® а§Ѓа§Ња§®а§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха•З а§µа§ња§™а§∞а•Аа§§, а§µа•Л а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ьа§®а•На§Ѓ а§Фа§∞ а§Ѓа•Га§§а•На§ѓа•Б а§Ха•З а§Ъа§Ха•На§∞ а§Єа•З а§™а§∞а•З а§єа•И, а§Еа§∞а•На§•а§Ња§§ а§Ъа§Ха•На§∞ а§Ѓа•З а§®а§єа•А а§Жа§§а•З а§Фа§∞ а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§Ђа§≤ - а§Єа•Ба§Ц а§µа§Њ а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§Ха•А а§Еа§®а•Ба§≠а•Ва§§а§њ а§®а§єа•А а§Ха§∞а§§а•З, а§Еа§∞а•На§•а§Ња§§ а§µа•Л а§Еа§Ха§∞а•На§§а§Њ а§єа•И, а§Єа§§а•На§ѓ а§єа•Иа•§ а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§® а§Єа§≠а•А а§Ѓа§Ња§®а§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха§Њ а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•Ла§Ъа•На§Ъ а§™а§ња§§а§Њ, а§Ѓа§Ња§§а§Њ, а§ґа§ња§Ха•На§Ја§Х, а§Єа§Ца§Њ а§Фа§∞ а§Єа§§а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§єа•Иа•§ а§єа§Ѓ а§Йа§®а§Ха•Л а§Ха•За§µа§≤ а§Ха§†а§ња§® а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§єа•И, а§ѓа§є а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§≠а•Аа§§а§∞ а§Ра§Єа§Њ а§Еа§Ва§§а§∞а•На§®а§ња§єа§ња§§ а§єа•Иа•§ а§єа§Ѓ а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§™а§ња§§а§Њ а§Ха•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§Ха•З а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓ а§Ѓа•З а§єа•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§Ха§∞а§§а•З а§єа•И, а§ѓа§є а§єа•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§Ѓа§® а§ђа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§њ а§Ѓа•З а§За§§а§®а•З а§§а§Х а§ђа•Иа§†а§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж а§єа•И а§Ха•А а§µа•Л а§єа•А а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а§Њ а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ-а§¶а§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•Иа•§

а§Ъа§ња§Ва§§а§Њ а§Ѓа•Ба§Ха•На§§ а§єа•Ла§®а•З а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§∞а•Ла§Ь а§Єа§µа•За§∞а•З а§Єа•Ба§®а•За§В а§ѓа•З а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§Ча•Аа§§ - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Bk Song | | а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Ха•А а§ѓа•З а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§Жа§™а§Ха•З а§Ѓа§® а§Ха•Л а§Еа§Ва§¶а§∞ а§Єа•З а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§ а§Ха§∞ а§¶а•За§Ча•А - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Bk Song | | а§Ѓа§® а§Ха•Л а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§¶а•За§®а•З а§µа§Ња§≤а•А а§ѓа•З а§¶а§ња§µа•На§ѓ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§∞а•Ла§Ь а§Ьа§∞а•Ва§∞ а§Єа•Ба§®а•За§В - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Bk Song | а§ѓа•З а§Ѓа§Іа•Ба§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§Єа•Ба§®а§§а•З а§єа•А а§Ша§∞ а§≠а•А а§Ѓа§Ва§¶а§ња§∞ а§ђа§® а§Ьа§Ња§Па§Ча§Њ - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Bk Song | Prarthana | а§Ша§∞ а§Ха§Њ а§µа§Ња§§а§Ња§µа§∞а§£ а§ґа§Ха•На§§а§ња§ґа§Ња§≤а•А а§ђа§®а§Ња§®а•З а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Ха•А а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Bk Song | а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Єа§µа•За§∞а•З а§Єа•Ба§®а•З а§Ьа§Ња§®а•З а§µа§Ња§≤а•А а§Єа§ђа§Єа•З а§Ѓа§Іа•Ба§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Prayer Song | Bk Song | а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Єа§µа•За§∞а•З а§Ха•А а§Єа§ђа§Єа•З а§ґа§Ха•На§§а§ња§ґа§Ња§≤а•А а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§Еа§µа§ґа•На§ѓ а§Єа•Ба§®а•За§В - Subah Ki Prarthana |Morning Prayer Song |Bk Song | а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Єа§µа•За§∞а•З а§ѓа•З а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ а§Ьа§∞а•Ва§∞ а§Єа•Ба§®а•З - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Prayer Song | #morningprayer 
а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§Ха•А Top10 а§Ѓа§® а§Ха•Л а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§¶а•За§®а•З а§µа§Ња§≤а•А а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ - Subah Ki Prarthana | Morning Prayer Song | Bk Song  | BK Murli | 2026 а§Ца•Ба§ґа§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Єа•З а§Эа•Ла§≤а•А а§≠а§∞ а§¶а•За§Ва§Ча•З а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ха•З а§ѓа•З а§Ча•Аа§§ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | BK Murli Songs | а§™а•На§∞а§§а§ња§¶а§ња§® а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ха•З а§ѓа•З а§Ча•Аа§§ а§Єа•Ба§®а§Ха§∞ а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§§а•А а§єа•И а§Ѓа§Ња§Єа§ња§Х а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | BK Murli Songsа§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ха•З а§ѓа•З а§Ча•Аа§§ а§Жа§™а§Ха•З а§Єа§Ња§∞а•З а§¶а•Ба§Га§Ц а§¶а§∞а•На§¶ а§¶а•Ва§∞ а§Ха§∞ а§¶а•За§Ва§Ча•З | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | BK Murli Songs | а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ха•З а§Ча•Аа§§ а§Єа•Ба§®а•З а§Ѓа§Ха§∞ а§Єа§Ва§Ха•На§∞а§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§™а§∞ а§єа§∞ а§Єа§Ва§Ха§Я а§¶а•Ва§∞ а§єа•Ла§Ча§Њ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | BK | а§Ѓа§Ха§∞ а§Єа§Ва§Ха•На§∞а§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§Єа•На§™а•За§ґа§≤ а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ча•Аа§§ а§Єа•Ба§®а§§а•З а§єа•А а§§а§® а§Фа§∞ а§Ѓа§® а§Эа•Ва§Ѓ а§Йа§†а•За§Ча§Њ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | BK Shiva а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ха•З а§ѓа•З а§≠а§Ьа§® а§Єа•Ба§®а§Ха§∞ а§Еа§Ва§§а§∞ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§™а§µа§ња§§а•На§∞ а§єа•Л а§Ьа§Ња§Па§Ча§Њ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | Shiv Baba Geet | а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§∞ 15 а§Ѓа§ња§®а§Я а§Ѓа•За§В а§Єа§Ња§∞а•З а§Єа§Ва§Ха§Я а§Ца§§а•На§Ѓ а§Ха§∞ а§¶а•За§Ча•А а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§ѓа•З а§Ѓа§Іа•Ба§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§Ња§∞а•На§•а§®а§Њ | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan 2026 | а§Ѓа•За§∞а§Њ а§§а•Ба§Ѓ а§ђа§ња§® а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха•Ла§И а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ | Shiv Baba Bhajan | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan | а§™а•На§∞а§§а§ња§¶а§ња§® а§Єа•Ба§ђа§є а§ѓа•З а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ча•Аа§§ а§Єа•Ба§®а•З а§Ѓа§Ња§®а§Єа§ња§Х а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§Ѓа§ња§≤а•За§Ча•А | Shiv Baba Bhajan | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan | а§®а•Аа§Ва§¶ а§Ѓа•За§В а§≠а•А а§Ча§Ња§Уа§Ча•З а§За§§а§®а§Њ а§Ѓа§Іа•Ба§∞ а§єа•И а§ґа§ња§µ а§ђа§Ња§ђа§Њ а§Ха§Њ а§ѓа•З а§≠а§Ьа§® | Shiv Baba Bhajan | Bk Songs | BK Bhajan

а§Иа§ґа•На§µа§∞ а§Ха•Л а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ха§єа§Њ а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•И, а§Еа§•а§µа§Њ а§ѓа§•а§Ња§∞а•На§• а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ха•Л а§єа•А а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§®, а§∞а§Ъа§§а§Њ а§Єа§∞а•На§µа§ґа§Ха•На§§а§ња§Ѓа§Ња§® а§Ха•З а§∞а•Ва§™ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа§Ња§®а§Њ а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•И l а§За§Єа§Ха§Њ а§Еа§∞а•На§• а§єа•И а§Ха§њ а§µа§є а§Єа§≠а•А а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•Ла§Ъа•На§Ъ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§єа§Ѓ а§Єа§∞а•На§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§У а§Ха•З а§™а§ња§§а§Њ (father) а§єа•И, а§Ьа•Л а§єа§Ѓа•З а§Єа•Ба§Ц а§Фа§∞ а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ а§Ха§Њ а§Еа§µа§ња§®а§Ња§ґа•А а§µа§∞а•На§Ја§Њ а§¶а•За§§а•З а§єа•И l а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха•А а§§а§∞а§є, а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§® а§™а•На§∞а§Ха§Ња§ґ а§Ха§Њ а§єа•А а§Па§Х а§Єа•Ва§Ха•На§Ја•На§Ѓ а§ђа§ња§Ва§¶а•Б а§єа•И, а§≤а•За§Ха§ња§® а§Ѓа§Ња§®а§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха•З а§µа§ња§™а§∞а•Аа§§, а§µа•Л а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Њ а§Ьа§®а•На§Ѓ а§Фа§∞ а§Ѓа•Га§§а•На§ѓа•Б а§Ха•З а§Ъа§Ха•На§∞ а§Єа•З а§™а§∞а•З а§єа•И, а§Еа§∞а•На§•а§Ња§§ а§Ъа§Ха•На§∞ а§Ѓа•З а§®а§єа•А а§Жа§§а•З а§Фа§∞ а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§Ђа§≤ - а§Єа•Ба§Ц а§µа§Њ а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§Ха•А а§Еа§®а•Ба§≠а•Ва§§а§њ а§®а§єа•А а§Ха§∞а§§а•З, а§Еа§∞а•На§•а§Ња§§ а§µа•Л а§Еа§Ха§∞а•На§§а§Њ а§єа•И, а§Єа§§а•На§ѓ а§єа•Иа•§ а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§® а§Єа§≠а•А а§Ѓа§Ња§®а§µ а§Жа§§а•На§Ѓа§Ња§Уа§В а§Ха§Њ а§Єа§∞а•На§µа•Ла§Ъа•На§Ъ а§™а§ња§§а§Њ, а§Ѓа§Ња§§а§Њ, а§ґа§ња§Ха•На§Ја§Х, а§Єа§Ца§Њ а§Фа§∞ а§Єа§§а§Ча•Ба§∞а•Б а§єа•Иа•§ а§єа§Ѓ а§Йа§®а§Ха•Л а§Ха•За§µа§≤ а§Ха§†а§ња§® а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§єа•И, а§ѓа§є а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§≠а•Аа§§а§∞ а§Ра§Єа§Њ а§Еа§Ва§§а§∞а•На§®а§ња§єа§ња§§ а§єа•Иа•§ а§єа§Ѓ а§™а§∞а§Ѓа§™а§ња§§а§Њ а§Ха•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§Ха•З а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓ а§Ѓа•З а§єа•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§Ха§∞а§§а•З а§єа•И, а§ѓа§є а§єа•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§Ѓа§® а§ђа•Ба§¶а•На§Іа§њ а§Ѓа•З а§За§§а§®а•З а§§а§Х а§ђа•Иа§†а§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж а§єа•И а§Ха•А а§µа•Л а§єа•А а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а§Њ а§ґа§Ња§Ва§§а§њ-а§¶а§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•Иа•§
